title: Author Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <authors_dir>/<id>.md file

examples.name: Andrej Karpathy
examples.bio: AI researcher known for pedagogical bottom-up implementations.

x-file-example:
---
id: andrej_karpathy
collection: author
name: "Andrej Karpathy"
url: https://karpathy.ai
bio: "AI researcher known for pedagogical bottom-up implementations."
company: "[[openai]]"
expertise:
  - "[[transformer_architecture]]"
  - "[[backprop]]"
sources:
  - "[[karpathy_makemore_2023]]"
verdict: recommended
---

## Notes
Great for fundamentals; builds everything from scratch.

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

collection.description: Node type — used by Obsidian-style apps to filter nodes by collection

url.description: Author's homepage, blog, or profile URL

bio.description: One-sentence description of who they are

company.description: [[wikilink]] reference to the company node this author is affiliated with

expertise.description: [[wikilink]] references to concept IDs this author covers well

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes from this author

verdict.description: User's overall recommendation — only set from explicit user opinion, never inferred
